videos.title: Watershed stroke
videos.relevance: Watershed-specific overview of border-zone stroke definitions, cortical/internal regions, and broad clinical context.

videos.title: Stroke Imaging playlist
videos.relevance: Covers vascular territories, CT/CTA/CTP, MRI DWI/ADC/FLAIR, complications, and mimics relevant to watershed pattern recognition.

videos.title: Stroke Imaging - Case 1
videos.relevance: CT/CTA/CTP/MRI stroke workflow case useful for contrast with larger territorial and perfusion patterns.

videos.title: Stroke Imaging - Case 2
videos.relevance: MCA territory and perfusion workflow case useful for distinguishing territorial core/penumbra from watershed pattern.

videos.title: CTA and CTP in the Evaluation & Treatment of Acute Ischemic Stroke Patients: Standards & Pitfalls
videos.relevance: CTA/CTP teaching for acute ischemic stroke and perfusion pitfalls relevant to watershed hypoperfusion context.

videos.title: Use of MRI (DWI, SWI, FLAIR) in Acute Ischemic Stroke
videos.relevance: Expert radiology sequence teaching for DWI/ADC/FLAIR/SWI interpretation.

videos.title: Diffusion Weighted Imaging (DWI) in Neuroradiology... made easy!
videos.relevance: Explains DWI, ADC maps, true diffusion restriction, and T2 shine-through for acute infarct interpretation.

videos.title: MRI in Acute Infarct - Role of Diffusion Weighted Imaging (DWI)
videos.relevance: Resident-facing DWI teaching for acute infarct detection and lesion pattern recognition.

videos.title: Mismatch FLAIR and Diffusion in Cranial Magnetic Resonance Imaging
videos.relevance: DWI/FLAIR mismatch teaching for lesion age and acute stroke MRI interpretation.

videos.title: Imaging approaches for acute ischemic stroke
videos.relevance: Acute ischemic stroke imaging approach including CT, MRI, CTA, CTP, core, penumbra, and late-window selection.

videos.title: Advances in the Treatment and Diagnosis of Acute Stroke: What You Need to Know
videos.relevance: Academic acute stroke diagnosis and treatment update useful for workflow context.

videos.title: AHA/ASA Early Management of Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke 2026 Update - Key Messages
videos.relevance: Guideline summary context for acute ischemic stroke pathway; not watershed-specific.

videos.title: Ischemic and Hemorrhagic Strokes | High Yield
videos.relevance: General ischemic stroke education useful for non-specialist background and contrast with hemorrhagic categories.

videos.title: Understanding Ischemic Stroke: Causes, Symptoms, Diagnosis, and Treatment
videos.relevance: General ischemic stroke teaching that can help frame watershed infarct as a subtype of ischemic stroke.

videos.title: Stroke
videos.relevance: General stroke subtype and mechanism teaching useful for learner-facing context and differential framing.
